articles.title: New Zealand chip away with three more wickets as history beckons
articles.description: Root run-out leaves hosts with next-to-no hope as wickets slip away before lunch

articles.title: Australia, India, South Africa and Great Britain qualify for women's event at LA28 Olympics
articles.description: They sealed their berths as they were the highest-placed eligible finishers from Oceania, Asia, Africa and Europe, respectively, in the Women's T20 World Cup

articles.title: Malan steps down as Ireland head coach, Wilson named replacement
articles.description: Fresh off a historic T20I series win over India, Malan - whose contract ran till early 2027 - felt the time was right

articles.title: Sooryavanshi must 'bide his time and wait,' says ten Doeschate
articles.description: Undeniably talented though he is, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi will "have to go through the same process as everyone else," Ryan ten Doeschate says

articles.title: Litton likely to return for second ODI in Zimbabwe
articles.description: Litton is expected to recover from his calf injury in time for the second and third ODIs in Zimbabwe and play "if he can meet all the parameters of our fitness test"

articles.title: Pretorius and Allen batter Freedom and take Unicorns to the top
articles.description: Andries Gous' unbeaten 83 had given Washington Freedom a solid 190 for 4, but Lhuan-dre Pretorius and Finn Allen smashed 102 in 5.4 overs to make it a cakewalk

articles.title: Hasabnis and Deol take India A past England A in first one-dayer
articles.description: Pratika Rawal, Niki Prasad and Minnu Mani played key roles for India A too, while Grace Scrivens and Charis Pavely impressed with the bat for England A

articles.title: Shanaka's blitz hands Knight Riders another defeat
articles.description: The batters let Los Angeles Knight Riders down against Seattle Orcas after their bowlers, led by Sunil Narine, Fabian Allen and Jason Holder, had set up a 155-run chase

articles.title: 'Disbelief' in India camp after a failure to adapt to 'fantastic' Ireland
articles.description: Assistant coach Ryan ten Doeschate said the side had been slow to respond to a different set of conditions, including the wind

articles.title: Tector: Never been involved in a bigger accomplishment
articles.description: While it can be debated whether it was Irish cricket's greatest result, without doubt it has been the sport's greatest week

articles.title: ‘Why and why now?’ - Michael Atherton questions Ben Stokes’ shock retirement timing
articles.description: The news was made public shortly before Tea on Day 4 of the Test. Interestingly, Stokes also promoted himself to open the innings as England began their chase of a challenging 373-run target.

articles.title: 'Lowest in the history of Indian cricket' - Sunil Gavaskar lambasts India after series defeat to Ireland
articles.description: Gavaskar criticised India's lacklustre performance over the past few days, which has resulted in the defeat.

articles.title: Gary Wilson joins Ireland men's team as new head coach, becomes first Irish-born to do so
articles.description: Wilson now steps into the Head Coach role at an important point in the international cycle, with the squad building towards qualification for the 2027 ICC Men’s Cricket World Cup.

articles.title: IOC confirms qualification and format for cricket’s historic return at LA28 Olympic Games
articles.description: “Cricket’s return to the Olympic Games is a landmark moment for our sport and a powerful opportunity to showcase the very best of cricket to the world," said Jay Shah.

articles.title: Heinrich Malan ends tenure as Ireland's head coach
articles.description: Malan has overseen numerous memorable days in Irish cricket history, including Ireland Men’s first Test cricket wins, and the recent first-ever win over India Men.

articles.title: Maharaja Trophy KSCA T20 2026: Match 19, MW vs CKM Match Prediction – Who will win today’s match between MW vs CKM?
articles.description: Both sides come into the game on the back of contrasting performances in their previous game.

articles.title: ‘The kind of 24-carat batting pitches we see in the IPL weren't available’ - Ravichandran Ashwin reacts to Ireland series defeat
articles.description: India lost to Ireland in the two-match T20I series 2-0.

articles.title: 'A little intent will have to be shown in batting' - Aakash Chopra on India's loss to Australia in Women's T20 World Cup 2026
articles.description: India put on a total of 170 for 4 after 20 overs, which the team failed to defend as the dominant Aussies romped home with an over to spare.

articles.title: ‘There’s a little bit of disbelief’ - Ryan ten Doeschate on India’s 2-0 T20I series loss to Ireland
articles.description: India won both tosses in Belfast yet still lost both T20Is, with ten Doeschate saying the team must learn to adapt quicker to different conditions.

articles.title: ENG vs NZ 2026: 'He's got to go with him' - Steve Harmison on Brendon McCullum after Ben Stokes' shock retirement
articles.description: Stokes and McCullum have formed a notable partnership, and while their degree of success is open for interpretation, they have revolutionised the team with an attacking mindset and positive approach.
